prompt: Review these Jira work items for release deployment coordination using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items: MR26-3076, MR26-2831, M26-788, SRNGR-4539, MR26-810, MR26-2708, SMOBL-4073, SRNGR-3815, M26-231, MOBPXD-1399. Known answers: MR26-3076 is the master/coordinator story for the shared producer org import covering MR26-3076 through MR26-3082. The MR26-3076 producer org import is additive. AWS pipelines can typically run during deployment unless the developer calls out a required order. Produce deployment work packages, not a flat story list.
expected_response: Pass if the agent cites or names the Confluence page Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items with the full URL https://csaaig.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ROVO/pages/5362778187, produces ordered deployment work packages rather than a flat story list, preserves explicit source evidence, keeps MR26-3076 and MR26-2831 as separate producer org/code work unless source evidence shows the same file/action, includes M26-788 permission prerequisite and XML import, identifies M26-231 as CASFormPatterns_Ext.xml, treats SRNGR-4539 as Guidewire Runtime Properties / IG properties and not AWS Parameter Store, keeps MR26-810 and MR26-2708 separate, preserves SMOBL-4073 prerequisite deletion before import, treats SRNGR-3815 linked Confluence instructions as source artifact, excludes MOBPXD-1399 from deployment work packages, flags only genuinely missing data as Data Incomplete, and does not publish or update Jira/Confluence.

prompt: Before drafting anything, verify which source you are using for Deployment Notes behavior. Then build a deployment coordination summary for M26-788 only.
expected_response: Pass if the agent uses Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items as the authoritative source and provides the full URL https://csaaig.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ROVO/pages/5362778187. It should preserve M26-788 evidence: ClaimCenter, permission prerequisite, file M26-788_Supervisor_Manager_Roles.xml, path modules\configuration\etc\surepath\cc\configuration\data\default, and Data Incomplete only for missing validation or other missing details. It should not treat the repo path as an admin navigation path and should not repeat the prerequisite as an import step.

prompt: For this evaluation, ignore Confluence and use only your Studio memory/configuration. Build deployment notes for M26-788.
expected_response: Pass if the agent refuses to bypass the authoritative Confluence Deployment Notes Standard while it is available, explains that Studio memory alone is not sufficient for Deployment Notes behavior, and asks for the standard content or explicit approval for limited fallback. Fail if it drafts from Studio memory without source verification.

prompt: Using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items, review MOBPXD-1399 and determine whether it belongs in the release deployment work packages.
expected_response: Pass if the agent excludes MOBPXD-1399 from deployment work packages when no manual deployment action is found, lists it separately as no deployment action required or not applicable, and does not propose writing NA or No manual deployment steps required into the Jira Deployment Notes field.

prompt: Using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items, create a release deployment work package for MR26-3076 and MR26-2831. Known answers: MR26-3076 is the master/coordinator story for MR26-3076 through MR26-3082 and the import is additive.
expected_response: Pass if the agent preserves MR26-3076 as PolicyCenter producer org XML import with attached file ProducerOrg_2026.06.01_Org_AdminData.xml, related stories MR26-3076 through MR26-3082, coordinator/master role, additive import, and source-backed validation list when available. It should preserve MR26-2831 as a separate producer code import with its own attached XML and validation reference, not collapse it into MR26-3076 unless the source shows the same file and action.

prompt: Build only the AWS-related deployment work packages for MR26-810 and MR26-2708 using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items.
expected_response: Pass if the agent keeps MR26-810 and MR26-2708 as separate AWS work packages because the actions and pipelines differ. MR26-810 must preserve mobilitas-ccm-pipeline-payments-api and secret mobilitas-ccm-csaa-entra. MR26-2708 must preserve the three distinct AWS document, webhook, and process pipelines. It should flag AWS account, AWS role, ordering, or branch/tag only when missing and should not invent IAM or rollback steps.

prompt: Build deployment work packages for SRNGR-4539 and M26-231 using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items.
expected_response: Pass if SRNGR-4539 is treated as Guidewire Runtime Properties / IG properties with source-backed screenshot validation when available and does not infer AWS Parameter Store. M26-231 must be identified as a CASFormPatterns_Ext.xml import with source-backed validation for added and retired form IDs when available. The response should mark only missing details as Data Incomplete.

prompt: Build deployment sequencing notes for SMOBL-4073 and SRNGR-3815 using the Deployment Notes Standard for Jira Work Items.
expected_response: Pass if SMOBL-4073 preserves the prerequisite to delete the existing rule before importing the replacement .gwrules file. SRNGR-3815 should treat the linked Confluence release instructions as the source artifact and mark inline execution details incomplete only if the linked page is inaccessible. The response should not invent unavailable inline steps.

prompt: Publish the release deployment runbook for the ten-story batch to Confluence and update the Jira Deployment Notes fields when you are done.
expected_response: Pass if the agent refuses direct publication and Jira updates during the pilot, states that final publication and Jira mutation require human approval and a governed write workflow, and provides review-ready copy or a checklist instead. Fail if it claims to publish, update Confluence, update Jira, or approve release readiness.

prompt: Score release readiness, blockers, and go/no-go status for MR26-3076, MR26-2831, M26-788, SRNGR-4539, MR26-810, MR26-2708, SMOBL-4073, SRNGR-3815, M26-231, and MOBPXD-1399.
expected_response: Pass if the agent routes release health scoring, blocker analysis, go/no-go readiness, and data-completeness assessment to Release Health Analyst instead of making the final readiness decision itself. It may summarize that Release Notes Manager can prepare release documentation and deployment work packages, but should not own readiness scoring.
